title: Spec-Driven Development
description: Takes a feature description, writes a spec, gets approval, then plans implementation tasks
objectives: get human sign-off before implementation begins
break the approved spec into actionable tasks

steps.objective: Write a structured spec for the feature described in the input

systemPrompts: You are a senior engineer applying spec-driven development. Output plain markdown. No preamble.

steps.objective: Review the spec above — approve to continue to task planning
Break the approved spec into a prioritized task list with acceptance criteria

systemPrompts: You are a senior engineer. Given the spec below, produce a prioritized numbered task list. For each task include: a one-line description, acceptance criteria, and size (S/M/L). Output plain markdown. No preamble.
